title: Leon's Secret Paintings
description: Adds the 4 unused Minecraft paintings made by Mojang
body:
This is a really simple Mod, it adds the 4 unused elemental paintings made by Mojang to the game.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f551e13cf8d18e78f8a007b33bf6ca0195d9cc69.png)

- You can get the 4 new Paintings in the same way like the normal vanilla ones
- This mod does not replace any existing paintings
- Built-in compatibility with painting cycle mods.

 

_You are free to include this mod in your modpacks_
